mapper.insert:
/* StandardCategoryCommandMyBatisDao.insertPrStdCtgList */ INSERT INTO PR_STD_CTG ( STD_CTG_NO, STD_CTG_NM, UPR_STD_CTG_NO, USE_YN, SORT_SEQ, LEAF_CTG_YN, SAFE_CERTI_NEED_YN, GOODS_NOTI_LISART_CD, HS_CD, MRGN_RATE, SAM_MARKET_YN, MD_ID, SYS_REG_ID, SYS_REG_DTM, SYS_MOD_ID, SYS_MOD_DTM ) VALUES
( (SELECT 'SC' || LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTR(STD_CTG_NO, 3)), '0')::INTEGER + 1 || '', 8, '0') FROM PR_STD_CTG), #{item.stdCtgNm}, #{item.uprStdCtgNo}, #{item.useYn}, #{item.sortSeq}, #{item.leafCtgYn}, #{item.safeCertiNeedYn}, #{item.goodsNotiLisartCd}, #{item.hsCd}, #{item.mrgnRate}, #{item.samMarketYn}, #{item.mdId}, 'admin', NOW(), 'admin', NOW() )
